prompts.name: Simple Earrings
prompts.text: Add simple earrings that complement the face with clean metallic highlights and tasteful scale.

prompts.name: Drop Earrings
prompts.text: Add elegant drop earrings with graceful shape, reflective detail, and balanced placement.

prompts.name: Hoop Earrings
prompts.text: Add hoop earrings with clean circular shape, polished metal, and stylish modern appeal.

prompts.name: Choker
prompts.text: Add a fitted choker around the neck with tasteful detail and natural placement.

prompts.name: Pendant Necklace
prompts.text: Add a pendant necklace with a small focal charm, subtle shine, and believable weight.

prompts.name: Layered Necklaces
prompts.text: Add layered necklaces with varied chain lengths, delicate highlights, and refined styling.

prompts.name: Bracelet
prompts.text: Add a bracelet with small decorative detail and natural wrist placement.

prompts.name: Bangles
prompts.text: Add stacked bangles with polished surfaces, subtle reflections, and rhythmic visual detail.

prompts.name: Rings
prompts.text: Add rings on the fingers with correct scale, tasteful design, and clear metallic detail.

prompts.name: Hair Chain
prompts.text: Add a delicate hair chain woven into the hairstyle with graceful shine and secure placement.

prompts.name: Tiara
prompts.text: Add a small tiara or crown with refined metalwork, gemstones, and regal elegance.

prompts.name: Gemstone Jewelry
prompts.text: Add gemstone jewelry with colored facets, realistic reflections, and ornate craftsmanship.

prompts.name: Silver Jewelry Set
prompts.text: Use a matching silver jewelry set with cool reflections and elegant coordination.

prompts.name: Gold Jewelry Set
prompts.text: Use a matching gold jewelry set with warm metallic shine and luxurious harmony.

prompts.name: Fantasy Ornaments
prompts.text: Add fantasy jewelry ornaments with arcane shapes, engraved metal, and subtle magical detail.
